booking_rejected.title: Booking not accepted
booking_rejected.bodyWithReason: Your booking for {service} on {date} was not accepted. Reason: {reason}
booking_rejected.bodyNoReason: Your booking for {service} on {date} was not accepted.

booking_completed.title: Visit completed
booking_completed.body: Your visit ({service} on {date}) is marked as completed.

booking_cancelled.title: Booking cancelled
booking_cancelled.byPatient: A patient cancelled their booking for {service} on {date}.
booking_cancelled.byOther: Your booking for {service} on {date} was cancelled.

nurse_signup.title: New nurse registration
nurse_signup.body: {nurseName} just signed up and is awaiting approval.

nurse_approved.title: Profile approved
nurse_approved.body: Your profile has been approved. You can now receive bookings.

nurse_rejected.title: Profile not approved
nurse_rejected.body: Your profile was not approved at this time. Please contact support for next steps.

order_created.title: New store order
order_created.body: A new order totaling {total} is awaiting review.

patient_id_verified.title: Identity verified
patient_id_verified.body: Your identity document was approved. You can now book a nurse.

patient_id_rejected.title: Identity verification needs attention
patient_id_rejected.body: Your identity document was not approved. Please upload a different document.
patient_id_rejected.bodyWithNote: Your identity document was not approved: {note}

body.booking_completed: You earned {amount} points on a completed booking.
body.order_delivered: You earned {amount} points on a delivered order.
body.review_submitted: You earned {amount} bonus points for leaving a review.
body.admin_adjust: An admin credited {amount} points to your account.

points_redeemed.title: {amount} points redeemed
points_redeemed.body: You redeemed {amount} points on your order.
